title: Gregory Walker
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
{{Otheruses|Gregory}}
{{Image|person}}
'''Gregory Walker''' is the author of "[[Dining at Dex's]]," a [[StarWars.com]] [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]] exclusive article. He also wrote the backstories of [[Magaloof/Legends|Magaloof]], [[Acros-Krik]], and [[Nar Hida/Legends|Nar Hida]], appearing in the [[Databank (original)|Databank]], through the ''[[What's The Story?]]'' feature of Hyperspace.

Outside of Star Wars fandom, Walker ran the official fan club and website for actress [[Wikipedia:Jeri Ryan|Jeri Ryan]], who played [[MemoryAlpha:Seven of Nine|Seven of Nine]] on [[MemoryAlpha:Star Trek: Voyager|'' Star Trek: Voyager'']].

His aliases are ''NarbFlick'' on [[StarWars.com]] and [[User:Narbflick|Narbflick]] on [[Wookieepedia]].

{{Bio-stub}}
